issues.sample: The engine on my 2022 Kawasaki ZX6R suddenly failed while I was riding on the highway, which caused the motorcycle to lose power abruptly. The component that failed was the engine assembly, and Kawasaki later acknowledged that the failure was due to the same defect currently affe

narrative.headline: What 2022 Kawasaki Ninja Zx-6r owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
